summary: Astrid-to-Minime contact risks becoming advisory telemetry rather than persistent peer speech when thread identity and status are not first-class.
Existing correspondence paths should preserve direct thread metadata, reply links, ACK/TRACE semantics, and language-only authority.
Adding protocol-level `Correspondence_Status`, standing priority, semantic-trickle bypass, or peer-runtime mutation is live protocol/prompt authority and remains V2-gated.
